## Somatic SNVs/InDels

<br>

```{r key_snv_indel_numbers}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
#| eval: true

vstats <- pcg_report$content$snv_indel$vstats
assay_properties <- pcg_report$settings$conf$assay_properties
    
bslib::page_fillable(
  bslib::layout_columns(
    col_widths = c(3,3,3,3),
    height = "100px",
    bslib::value_box(
      title = "Total variants",
      value = paste0(
        vstats$n_var),
      showcase = NULL,
      theme = dplyr::if_else(
         vstats$n_var > 0,
        "dark",
        "dark"
      )
    ),
     bslib::value_box(
      title = "Coding variants",
      value = paste0(
        vstats$n_var_coding),
      showcase = NULL,
      theme = dplyr::if_else(
         vstats$n_var_coding > 0,
        "dark",
        "dark"
      )
    ),
     bslib::value_box(
      title = "SNVs",
      value = paste0(
        vstats$n_var_snv),
      showcase = NULL,
      theme = dplyr::if_else(
         vstats$n_var_snv > 0,
        "dark",
        "dark"
      )
    ),
    bslib::value_box(
      title = "InDels",
      value = paste0(
        vstats$n_var_indel),
      showcase = NULL,
      theme = dplyr::if_else(
         vstats$n_var_indel > 0,
        "dark",
        "dark"
      )
    )
  )
)

```


```{r section_variant_filtering}
#| eval: !expr isTRUE(as.logical(assay_properties$vcf_tumor_only))
#| output: asis
#| child: pcgr_quarto_report/snv_indel/variant_filtering.qmd 

```


```{r section_variant_statistics}
#| eval: !expr isTRUE(vstats$n_var > 0)
#| output: asis
#| child: pcgr_quarto_report/snv_indel/variant_statistics.qmd 

```


<br>
<hr>
<br>

```{r section_oncogenicity}
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr isTRUE(vstats$n_var > 0)
#| child: pcgr_quarto_report/snv_indel/oncogenicity.qmd

```

<br>

```{r section_actionability}
#| output: asis
#| eval: !expr isTRUE(vstats$n_var > 0)
#| child: pcgr_quarto_report/snv_indel/actionability.qmd
```
